name: pro
description: Codex plugin wrapper for UI UX Pro Max design intelligence.

interface.shortDescription: Professional UI and UX design intelligence for Codex.
interface.longDescription: Adds UI UX Pro Max skills to Codex with guidance for styles, typography, palettes, components, layouts, and design-system decisions.
defaultPrompt: Design a polished landing page with a strong visual direction and responsive layout.
Recommend a design system for my app with typography, colors, and component rules.
Review this UI for accessibility, spacing, hierarchy, and interaction quality.
